name: Python 3
updateContentCommand: [ -f packages.txt ] && sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade -y && sudo xargs apt install -y < packages.txt
[ -f requirements.txt ] && pip3 install --user -r requirements.txt || echo 'Requirements.txt not found or invalid'
echo '✅ Packages installed and Requirements met'

postAttachCommand.server: streamlit run app.py --server.address 0.0.0.0 --server.port 8501 --server.headless true --server.enableCORS false --server.enableXsrfProtection false
